ORDER RE DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JEANMARIE HRYSHKO, JERROLD JACOBY MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING STANDS AS FOLLOWS; GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO THE FOLLOWING LANGUAGE "PURSUANT TO THE WRITTEN LEASE AGREEMENT" AS IT APPEARS IN COMPLAINT 20:22. MOTION IS DENIED OTHERWISE. ALLEGATIONS ARE NOT IRRELEVANT, FALSE OR IMMATERIAL. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS RE: MALICE AND OPPRESSION. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE HARRY M. DORFMAN, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.

Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Luke VanderDrift, Esq. of Tobener Law Center, (415-504-2165), for Charlie Barrett, Cross Defendant and moving party.
Andrew Catterall, Esq. of Zacks & Freedman, (415-956-8100), for Jeanmaire Hryshko, Cross Complainant and opposing party.
Reporter Carol Worsdell, #11365, (415-227-4060)

Hearing is held. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: Demurrer To First Amended Cross Complaint is taken under submission. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Demurrer To First Amended Complaint

Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative Cross-Complaint to department 501 no later than June 6, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2014 Continued To Apr-11-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANTS JUDITH BARRETT, CYRUS FRIEDLANDER and CHARLIE BARRETT'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Continued to April 11, 2014. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Set For Trial On Oct-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Attorney Kendall a. Layne (415)438-5904 for Defendant Jeanmarie Hryshko the moving party/ Attorney John Malleo for Plaintiff Charlie Barrett the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT JEANMARIE HRYSHKO, JERROLD JACOBY MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT the Court's tentative Ruling Stands as follows;
GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the following language "pursuant to the written lease agreement" as it appears in Complaint 20:22. Motion is denied otherwise. Allegations are not irrelevant, false or immaterial. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts re: malice and oppression. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
